description: Style NoteNow carry your monetary essentials in style with this leather wallet from new hide. The wallets come with a stylish upper and spacious inner making it must-have accessory!Product DetailsBrown two-fold wallet with two main compartmentsMultiple card holders, insert pockets, and an additional flap for id card, folding inside horizontally, on the left sideBranding embossed on the frontMaterial and CareLeatherRub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirtSizeDimensions: 11 cm x 9 cm
